certified_capabilities: Verifies assignment, invocation request, authorization, execution packet, chain, replay, authority, and hash continuity.
Determines assigned Worker identity, dispatch eligibility, execution packet compatibility, role compatibility, authority continuity, and replay continuity.
Persists dispatch evidence, classification, artifact, and result.
Supports Filesystem Worker, Monitoring Worker, and approved Trading Improvement acceptance flows.

validation_commands.command: python -m pytest tests/test_worker_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_assignment_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_invocation_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_authorization_runtime_v1.py tests/test_ready_for_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_runtime_v1.py tests/test_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_invocation_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_runtime_v1.py tests/test_result_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_implementation_plan_to_execution_request_runtime_v1.py

remaining_gap_before_first_worker_invoca: A governed Worker invocation runtime must consume WORKER_DISPATCH_ARTIFACT_V1.

Invocation must validate dispatch lineage, assignment lineage, invocation request lineage, authorization lineage, Worker identity continuity, execution packet continuity, allowed outputs, forbidden operations, replay continuity, and authority continuity.
Execution, result validation, post-execution replay review, and termination remain separate downstream certifications.
